spec_match.rationale: Perfectly plots live actual transitions matching the spec's document.visibilityState.

interactive.rationale: The page actively listens for visibilitychange events, adding timeline nodes in real-time, and simulates custom priority matrix selections.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly addresses the crash report prioritization metrics.

edge_cases.rationale: Outputs a clean priority label matching all four segments of the triage matrix.

design_system.rationale: Includes distinct badges, clean columns, and is fully conformant to theme styling.

summary: Outstanding live tracking demo that lets the developer leave the tab to record real background events.
